- Description: Kopi Bar & Bakery partner page setup — execution

  Details:
  Executed all code changes, image uploads, PRs, and deployments for the complete Kopi Bar & Bakery partner page setup on agroverse.shop.
  
  **What was done:**
  - Added Kopi Bar entry to partners-data.js with Berkeley, CA coordinates
  - Fixed nav ("Stockists" → "Cacao Journeys") and standardized footer on the detail page
  - Found and downloaded Kopi Bar logo from their website, uploaded to assets
  - Uploaded 5 photos (exterior, Nora with cacao, tasting session, hours signage, BAMPFA entrance) to the Kopi Bar detail page
  - Updated Pacific West Coast path JS to use Nora's photo as the Kopi Bar stop image
  - Replaced logo with storefront signage photo
  - 4 PRs merged and promoted to prod
  
  **PRs:**
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/173
